decks.label: Burn Bank-and-Cash vs Doom Knight
decks.notes: Loop-10 mage (~L6, INT~3). Opens with cheap 1m appliers (Spark, Flame Dart) to bank burn while mana is fresh; free Gust for tempo. Pyre (1m) cashes+rebanks mid-fight against the 380HP boss. Cinder Sprint (1m self-detonator) is the early cheap nuke; the 1s+1m Cinderlance sits last so the small stamina pool has regenerated for the big cash. Magma Vein adds armor cushion vs the 9-dmg hits. Order interleaves so nothing stalls on empty mana back-to-back.
